name: nexari-tizen
description: Nexari Signage — Samsung Smart TV unified player (Tizen 4+, replaces tizen + tizen-sbb)

scripts.build: cross-env API_BASE=https://ds.chiho.app/api/v1 WS_URL=wss://ds.chiho.app node scripts/generate-build-info.cjs && tsc
scripts.build:dev: cross-env API_BASE=http://192.168.1.17/api/v1 WS_URL=ws://192.168.1.17 node scripts/generate-build-info.cjs && tsc
